item.text: I’m tracing the `V2RuntimeHost` implementations through the Orbit knowledge-graph CLI only, and I’ll verify each result before listing anything.

item.text: I’ve confirmed the tool runner entrypoint; next I’m checking which graph commands are available so I can query the trait and its implementors without touching raw file search.

item.text: The graph tools are registered, but some commands need the repo root passed explicitly to open the store cleanly. I’m re-running with `--root` so the results stay fully verified.
